name: ENvue Medical, Inc.
business: ENvue Medical, Inc. sells the ENvue System, an electromagnetic navigation platform for safe and efficient insertion of enteral feeding tubes, primarily to acute care hospitals in the United States. Through its NanoVibronix subsidiary, it also markets PainShield devices for non-invasive pain therapy and biofilm prevention, sold to Veterans Administration facilities and workers' compensation programs. The company's revenue is derived from system sales and recurring disposable tube sales.

exposures.sentence: ENvue is a medical device company engaged in the research, development, production, marketing, and sale of medical devices in the field of enteral feeding and is in the growth stage of commercializing its products.

During the year, the Company initiated development of a next-generation robotic platform within its ENvue Medical division, referred to as ENvue Drive, intended to automate aspects of electromagnetic navigation for enteral and vascular access procedures at the bedside.

catalysts.event: Distribution agreement with U-Deliver for ENfit compatible syringes through non-acute care channels
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, ENvue signed a distribution agreement with U-Deliver, a U.S. based supplier of enteral feeding supplies, to distribute ENvue s ENFit compatible syringes through non-acute care channels nationwide.

tamClaims.claim: Global enteral feeding devices market valued at $4.62 billion in 2025
tamClaims.sentence: The global enteral feeding devices market size was valued at $4.62 billion in 2025 (Enteral Feeding Devices Market Trends; Grand View Research; available at: https://www.grandviewresearch.com/industry-analysis/enteral-feeding-devices-industry Grand View Research ).

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 43 million feeding tubes are inserted annually worldwide
tamClaims.sentence: Around 43 million feeding tubes are inserted annually worldwide (Enteral feeding devices, Global forecast to 2025; Market & Markets ( Markets & Markets )).

tamClaims.claim: Market expected to grow at CAGR of approximately 5.86% from 2024 to 2030, reaching $7.19 billion by 2030
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated that the market will grow at an annual rate (CAGR) (hereinafter: the Growth Rate ) of approximately 5.86% (about 4.4% in the USA) from 2024 to 2030, with the total market value expected to reach approximately $7.19 billion by 2030 (Grand View Research).
